title: Reach B1 in a New Language (180 days)
description: Combine spaced-repetition vocabulary (Ebbinghaus forgetting curve, SuperMemo SM-2) with daily comprehensible input at the i+1 level (Krashen's input hypothesis) to reach CEFR B1 — independent conversational use — in six months.
advice: Volume beats intensity. 45 min/day every day > 5 hours once a week. Output (speaking) starts week 8 — silent period first, per Krashen.

subGoals.title: A1: Survival phrases (~500 words)
subGoals.description: Greetings, numbers, basic needs. Most-frequent 500 words cover ~70% of spoken text.

subGoals.title: A2: Everyday topics (~1500 words)
subGoals.description: Can describe routine, immediate environment. First conversation partner sessions begin.

subGoals.title: B1 listening threshold (~2500 words)
subGoals.description: Native podcasts at 0.75x speed comprehensible. Krashen's i+1 zone reached.

subGoals.title: B1: Independent user
subGoals.description: Can hold a 15-min conversation on familiar topics. Self-assess against CEFR descriptors.

tasks.title: Anki reviews (15 min)
tasks.description: SM-2 spacing — review whatever the algorithm surfaces. Skipping a day doubles tomorrow's load.

tasks.title: Comprehensible input (30 min)
tasks.description: Podcasts, graded readers, or shows with target-language subtitles. Aim for 80-90% understanding (i+1).

tasks.title: Weekly tutor / exchange call
tasks.description: Output forces retrieval. Italki / Tandem from week 8 onward (after silent period).

tasks.title: CEFR self-assessment
tasks.description: Tick descriptors on the Council of Europe self-assessment grid. Objective progress signal.
